title: Database on U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) Budgets for Energy Research, Development, & Demonstration (1978–2018R)
summary: The attached document contains the June 2017 updates to the authors' database on U.S. government investments in energy research, development, demonstration, and deployment (ERD3) through the Department of Energy.
body: Overview The attached document contains June 2017 updates to our database on U.S. government investments in energy research, development, demonstration, and deployment (ERD3) through the Department of Energy. The database, in Microsoft Excel format, tracks DOE appropriations from FY 1978–2017 and the 2018 budget request and includes funding for ERD3 from the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act (ARRA) of 2009. It also includes several charts. The latest from Belfer See more Downloads DOE Budget Authority for Energy Research, Development, & Demonstration Database For more information on this publication: Please contact Prof Kelly Sims Gallagher at the Center for International Environment & Resource Policy, The Fletcher School, Tufts University or Prof Laura Diaz Anadon at C-EENRG, University of Cambridge. Recommended citation Gallagher, K.S. and L.D. Anadon, "DOE Budget Authority for Energy Research, Development, and Demonstration Database," Fletcher School of Law and Diplomacy, Tufts University; Department of Land Economy, Center for Environment, Energy and Natural Resource Governance (C-EENRG), University of Cambridge; and Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School. June 27, 2017.
